title: Sidebar IA: 9 main + 2 'Mehr' items is too flat for a 6-entity tool
what_you_tried: Toured every admin route and counted nav targets vs entities a Kassenwartin actually thinks about.
what_happened: Sidebar lists Heute / Audit Inbox / Transaktionen / Mitglieder / Rechnungen / Projekte / Kunden / Jahresabschluss / Einstellungen + Mehr {DSGVO, Dev/Mails}. The 6 actual entities (Members / Invoices / Projects / Customers / Transactions / Closing) are split across 7 top-level items and stamdaten-like things are not grouped.
what_you_expected: 5 top-level items: Übersicht / Inbox / Transaktionen / Stammdaten (submenu: Mitglieder, Projekte, Kunden) / Jahresabschluss. Einstellungen as a single bottom-corner item that contains DSGVO-Tools and (dev-only) Sheet-Resync.
suggested_fix: Refactor nav-registry to add a 'submenu' kind; introduce a single 'Stammdaten' parent that contains Mitglieder + Projekte + Kunden. Move DSGVO and Sheet-Resync into Einstellungen as sub-tabs. Drop the 'Mehr' collapsible group entirely once empty.

title: 'Mehr' sidebar group hides only 2 items, one of which is dev-tooling
what_you_tried: Opened the 'Mehr' collapsible section in desktop sidebar.
what_happened: Reveals 2 items: DSGVO and Dev/Mails. Dev/Mails should never be in production navigation.
what_you_expected: Group hides 0 items in production. DSGVO moved under Einstellungen.
suggested_fix: Gate Dev/Mails behind `import.meta.env.DEV` or a `?dev=1` flag. Move DSGVO. Delete the 'Mehr' header once empty.

title: Dashboard 'Was möchtest du heute tun' renders 3 disabled grey checklist rows at zero state
what_you_tried: Opened /app with no data and observed the prescriptive checklist.
what_happened: Three rows each with a faint '0' badge and a half-disabled-styled 'Inbox öffnen →' / 'Transaktionen öffnen →' / 'Mitglieder öffnen →' pill. Reads as 'three broken actions' rather than 'nothing to do'.
what_you_expected: When all zero: a single celebratory line ('Alles im grünen Bereich. ☕ Genieß deinen Tag.') and no pseudo-disabled CTAs.
suggested_fix: If openAuslagen + approvedNotErstattet + openBeitragsMembers === 0, render a single line replacement. Otherwise render only the rows where count > 0 (drop the others). Don't show disabled-styled actions for done items.

title: No global year switcher — multi-year browsing requires URL-typing
what_you_tried: Tried to look at 2025 Transaktionen while in May 2026.
what_happened: No control to switch year except by hand-typing /app/jahresabschluss/2025.
what_you_expected: A year picker in the topbar between breadcrumb and search, with URL-prefix `/app/y/2025/...` for year-scoped pages; non-year pages hide the picker.
suggested_fix: Add a [year] dynamic segment under /app (e.g. /app/y/[year]/...) plus a Topbar dropdown. Cookie-persist last selection for 30 days. Render an amber 'Du siehst Daten aus 2025. Zu 2026 wechseln →' strip when not current year. When user books a transaction with a Datum in another year, show a soft warning + redirect after save.

title: Submit buttons describe the system, not the action
where: src/routes/app/rechnungen/new/+page.svelte (PDF generieren), src/lib/components/admin/inbox/ManuellHinzufuegenSheet.svelte (Einreichung speichern), src/routes/app/transactions/neu (Ausgabe erfassen — tracks only ausgabe variant)
what_you_tried: Opened every form and read the submit button label.
what_happened: 'PDF generieren' actually creates a Rechnung row AND a PDF. 'Einreichung speichern' is also creating a row. 'Ausgabe erfassen' is correct for Ausgabe but doesn't change to 'Einnahme erfassen' when Typ switches to Einnahme.
what_you_expected: Each button describes the dominant user-facing action and tracks form state.
suggested_fix: Rename PDF generieren → 'Rechnung erstellen'. Einreichung speichern → 'In Inbox legen'. Wire submit label to typ via `let label = $derived(typ === 'ausgabe' ? 'Ausgabe erfassen' : typ === 'einnahme' ? 'Einnahme erfassen' : 'Spende erfassen')`.

title: Empty states have no inline CTA — primary action only at page-top
what_you_tried: Visited each empty list page and looked for a way to add the first row from within the empty card.
what_happened: The empty card just says 'Lege die erste Rechnung mit dem Button oben an.' No button inside the dashed card.
what_you_expected: A secondary CTA inside each empty card ('+ Erste Rechnung anlegen') in addition to the top-right primary.
suggested_fix: In each empty-state component, add a centered ghost-style button linking to the create route. Use the existing icon system.

title: Date inputs show `mm/dd/yyyy` placeholder on a German app
what_you_tried: Inspected every date field on Chrome at the German locale.
what_happened: Native `<input type='date'>` renders `mm/dd/yyyy` placeholder regardless of OS locale.
what_you_expected: `dd.MM.yyyy` placeholder with calendar picker.
suggested_fix: Either (a) render a `<input type='text' inputmode='numeric' pattern='\d{2}\.\d{2}\.\d{4}'>` with a popover calendar (use radix-ui datepicker or build a tiny one), or (b) acknowledge the inconsistency and add a `lang='de-DE'` attribute on `<html>` if not already set + accept browser-dependent rendering. Test on Firefox and Safari.

title: Sidebar label 'Heute' mismatches dashboard content
what_you_tried: Clicked 'Heute' and looked at what's on the page.
what_happened: Page shows KPIs (YTD donations, year-long Freigrenze, total open Auslagen) — none of which are 'heute'.
what_you_expected: Label matches content: 'Übersicht' or 'Start'.
suggested_fix: Rename to 'Übersicht'. (5-minute change in nav-registry.)

title: No toast / soft-undo on destructive or significant actions
what_you_tried: Mentally walked through ablehnen / archivieren / stornieren / erstatten flows from the codebase.
what_happened: Codebase uses confirm modals + page reload for destructive actions. No toast layer visible in AdminShell.
what_you_expected: After every state-changing action, show a toast with 'Rückgängig' for 8s.
suggested_fix: Add a toast portal in AdminShell (svelte-sonner is small and accessible). Wire each form action to return a flash message; client-side useFlash hook drives the toast. Backend revert is an additional INSERT into the entity table with previous state (preserves audit log).

title: Dashboard greeting falls back to email-prefix; no UI to set name
what_you_tried: Logged in as juliaschwarz97@web.de and looked at the greeting and Einstellungen.
what_happened: Greeting reads 'Guten Abend, juliaschwarz97 👋'. Einstellungen shows email + admin role but no 'Mein Name' field. User has no way to fix.
what_you_expected: Either a settings field for `name` or a smarter fallback that strips digits + capitalizes.
suggested_fix: Add a 'Profil' section in /app/einstellungen with an inline-editable 'Anzeigename' field. Until then, improve fallback: `email.split('@')[0].replace(/\d+/g, '').replace(/^\w/, c => c.toUpperCase())` → 'Juliaschwarz'. Better than the raw username.

title: Checklist rows render disabled-looking buttons for already-done items
what_you_tried: Looked at /app at zero state.
what_happened: Each checklist row has an outline-button-like 'Inbox öffnen →' pill at 50% opacity. Reads as a broken button.
what_you_expected: When the row's count is 0, don't render the row (it's done). Or treat it as a green ✓ summary row, not a faded action.
suggested_fix: In ChecklistSection, filter rows to those with count > 0. If all are 0, render the celebratory single-line summary mentioned in UX-003.

title: Transaktionen has overlapping filter UIs: tabs + chips + search
what_you_tried: Tried to filter to 'Diesen Monat + Ausgaben' simultaneously.
what_happened: Two visually similar but semantically different control rows: 4 type tabs (Alle/Ausgaben/Einnahmen/Spenden) above a 3-chip 'Ansicht: ...' row. Clicking a chip doesn't show active state. Unclear if filters compose.
what_you_expected: One unified filter bar with a clear active state and obvious composition rules.
suggested_fix: Merge into a single FilterBar component: left side = type tabs (Alle is implicit), right side = saved-view dropdown with check marks. Active chip gets `data-active=true` and a primary-bg fill.

title: Filter chips have no active visual state
what_you_tried: Clicked 'Diesen Monat' chip and looked for visual confirmation.
what_happened: Chip's hover-state appears identical to its rest-state; URL changes but the chip doesn't visibly persist as selected.
what_you_expected: Active chip darkens + receives a primary border.
suggested_fix: Add `class:active={isActive}` plus a CSS rule `.active { background: var(--color-primary); color: var(--color-primary-foreground); }`.

title: Transaction-neu is a full-page form instead of a side sheet
what_you_tried: Clicked 'Neue Transaktion' from the list.
what_happened: Full page navigation. After submit, returns to list with no scroll-to-new and no confirmation toast.
what_you_expected: A right-side Sheet overlay (like the Manuell-hinzufügen sheet on /app/inbox). Submit closes the sheet, prepends the row, optimistic update + toast.
suggested_fix: Convert /app/transactions/neu into a route that opens a Sheet on top of /app/transactions. Use SvelteKit's `(parallel)` routing for a modal pattern, or simply navigate with a `?neu=1` param and conditionally render the Sheet.

title: EÜR page lacks YoY context, monthly trend, project filter
what_you_tried: Viewed /app/jahresabschluss/2026 with zero data and imagined a populated year.
what_happened: Sphere-aggregation table + Bundle download + Festschreibung box. No YoY comparison, no monthly trend, no per-project filter. Subtitle is internal-speak ('Sphere-Aggregation nach ADR-0002').
what_you_expected: A page that answers 'how's the year going?' at a glance — see the redesign sketch in 2026-05-19-deepdive-ux-expert.md §2.1.
suggested_fix: Add 4 KPI cards (Einnahmen / Ausgaben / Überschuss / vs. Vorjahr) above the sphere table. Add a cumulative monthly trend SVG. Add a project select that filters both. Move Bundle + Festschreibung into a single footer band. Drop the ADR subtitle.

title: EÜR header uses hardcoded `#9c2870` pink that doesn't match brand `--color-primary`
what_you_tried: Compared the EÜR header bar to the sidebar's active item.
what_happened: Two slightly different pinks side by side. Brand is `oklch(0.43 0.20 350)` ≈ `#BE185D`. EÜR header is `#9c2870`. Close but visibly off.
what_you_expected: Single source of truth via `bg-primary text-primary-foreground`.
suggested_fix: Replace `bg-[#9c2870]` with `bg-primary`. Adjust `text-pink-200` to `text-primary-foreground/80`.

title: Mitglieder year-badges (2024 2025 2026) communicate nothing visually
what_you_tried: Looked at the Mitglieder list at /app/mitglieder.
what_happened: Each member has 3 identical-looking year pills with empty circles inside.
what_you_expected: Color-coded by Beitragsstatus: green=bezahlt, amber=offen, grey=N/A.
suggested_fix: BeitragsBadge already accepts a status prop — pass it. Map status → CSS classes. Add a tooltip with the exact amount + payment date.

title: Member avatar palette uses 10 hash-bucketed colors at brand-disconnected hues
what_you_tried: Scanned the Mitglieder list and the avatar tiles.
what_happened: 10 colors include sky, mint, sand, lilac — none of which connect to the rosa brand. With 15 members, collisions are still likely.
what_you_expected: 5 brand-aligned colors (rosa, pink, fuchsia, plus 2 cool accents). Hash mod 5.
suggested_fix: Cut palette to 5. Optionally allow per-member override stored in DB.

title: Topbar search promises Mitglied / Auslage / Rechnung but indexes only some
what_you_tried: Typed 'felix' and 'test' into the search field on /app.
what_happened: Always returns 'Keine Ergebnisse für …' even though Felix Bauer exists in Mitglieder.
what_you_expected: At minimum, name-substring match across Mitglieder + Bezeichnung match across Transaktionen + AUS-ID prefix match across Auslagen.
suggested_fix: Verify search server returns member rows. If not implemented, narrow the placeholder copy: 'Suchen… (Auslagen, Rechnungen)' until members are indexed.

title: `⌘K` kbd badge implies command palette; reality is just-focus-the-search-field
what_you_tried: Pressed Cmd+K on /app.
what_happened: Search input focuses. No palette appears.
what_you_expected: Either a proper command palette (with action items at top: 'Neue Auslage', 'Neue Transaktion', 'Springe zu Jahresabschluss') OR drop the `⌘K` badge.
suggested_fix: Build a tiny command palette: open a centered floating div on `⌘K`, mix entity results with 3-4 action commands at the top. Reuse the existing search API.

title: Transaktionen has no Projekt filter — can't answer 'what did the Bar-Pop-up cost'
what_you_tried: Tried to filter Transaktionen to just one Projekt.
what_happened: No filter exists for Projekt despite the data being in every row.
what_you_expected: A Projekt select in the filter bar, or a clickable Projekt-pill on each row that filters in-place.
suggested_fix: Add a Projekt select to TransactionsList filters (uses SavedViewsBar component). Also make the Projekt-pill on each row a `<button>` that toggles the filter.

title: Recent Activity feed dominated by 'session angemeldet' entries
what_you_tried: Viewed dashboard recent activity tile.
what_happened: 3 of 3 most recent are 'session angemeldet' for the same user — has no signal.
what_you_expected: Either suppress session events from this feed or aggregate ('Du hast dich heute 3× angemeldet').
suggested_fix: In the load function, filter audit_log entries to exclude `kind = 'session'` (or whatever the audit kind is for sign-ins). Or aggregate per-day in SQL with `count() filter (where kind = 'session') as sessions_today`.

title: Manuell-hinzufügen sheet has a 2-sentence developer apology about Beleg upload
what_you_tried: Opened the sheet from Inbox → Manuell hinzufügen.
what_happened: Reads 'Beleg-Upload: Lade den Scan nach dem Speichern direkt in Drive hoch und verknüpfe ihn beim Freigeben der Einreichung.' — explains the workaround in the form.
what_you_expected: Either upload UI inline (reuse BelegUpload component) or hide this paragraph behind a small 'Wie kommt der Beleg dazu?' tooltip.
suggested_fix: Drop the BelegUpload from /auslage-einreichen as a Svelte component and reuse it here. Or wrap the text in a `<details>` collapsed by default.

title: Sheets and modals likely don't close-on-success + scroll-to-new
what_you_tried: Read the source for the manuell-hinzufügen action.
what_happened: Form submits via SvelteKit form action with `enhance` — return type unclear. No visible toast/sonner integration; success likely just re-renders the page leaving the sheet open.
what_you_expected: After 200 response: close sheet, prepend row in list, scroll to new row, fire toast.
suggested_fix: On successful action, set `sheetOpen = false`, fire `toast.success('Einreichung gespeichert')`, scroll the new row into view via `el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })`.

title: TransactionsList BulkActionsBar exists in code but isn't surfaced
what_you_tried: Looked for a way to select multiple rows in Transaktionen.
what_happened: No checkboxes on row hover. Bulk actions UI exists in repo but isn't connected on the empty list.
what_you_expected: Once rows exist, hovering a row reveals a checkbox; selecting any shows the BulkActionsBar.
suggested_fix: Wire selection state in TransactionsList. Use a Set<id> for selected ids. BulkActionsBar should slide up from below when selection is non-empty.

title: No inline-create for Kund:in / Projekt pickers in Rechnungen and Transaktionen
what_you_tried: Created a Rechnung for a new venue.
what_happened: Kund:in select shows '-- bitte wählen --' with no '+ Neuer Kunde' option. Required to cancel, navigate to /app/kunden, add, return.
what_you_expected: Last item in the dropdown is '+ Neue:r Kund:in anlegen…' that opens an inline Sheet, creates the customer, returns the new id, selects it.
suggested_fix: Use a Combobox component with a footer action. Most svelte UI kits (shadcn-svelte's Combobox) support this. Render the inline-create as a SheetOverlay that returns the new id.

title: Projekte list has no Aktiv/Archiviert filter or status pill
what_you_tried: Imagined the page after 2-3 years of accumulated projects.
what_happened: All projects render in a flat list with no archival concept visible.
what_you_expected: A 'Aktiv / Archiviert' tab and a status pill on each row. Default to Aktiv.
suggested_fix: Add `archived_at` to the projekte schema (if absent), add a tab toggle on /app/projekte, render an archive button in the row kebab menu.

title: Kunden list missing 'letzte Rechnung' subtitle
what_you_tried: Looked at Kunden list (Antonia Beispiel, Beispiel GmbH).
what_happened: Each row shows only name + icon. No 'last invoiced' info.
what_you_expected: Subtitle: 'Letzte Rechnung: 18.04.2026 · 850 €' or '— noch keine Rechnungen'.
suggested_fix: Join customer rows with `MAX(rechnungen.rechnungsdatum)` and `SUM(rechnungen.betrag_cents)` in the load query.

title: /sign-in email input missing autocomplete + inputmode
what_you_tried: Focused the email field on mobile.
what_happened: Standard keyboard, no autofill suggestion from password manager.
what_you_expected: `autocomplete='email'` + `inputmode='email'` + `spellcheck='false'`.
suggested_fix: Add the three attributes to the input element.

title: Sign-in form replaces itself entirely on success — see prior HIGH-14
what_you_tried: Submitted /sign-in.
what_happened: Form vanishes, replaced by success chip.
what_you_expected: Form stays visible (disabled) with success card above; user can edit email and resubmit.
suggested_fix: Keep the form visible; render an inline success card above with the email and a 'Andere Adresse?' link that resets state.

title: /app/dsgvo title 'DSGVO-Verwaltung' is bureaucratic
what_you_tried: Read the page title.
what_happened: 'DSGVO-Verwaltung' — sounds like admin tooling.
what_you_expected: 'Datenschutz-Auskunft & Löschung' — describes what you do.
suggested_fix: Update the h1 and the nav label.

title: /app/dsgvo Pseudonymisieren button has unclear visual weight
what_you_tried: Looked at the two action buttons (Auskunft generieren / Pseudonymisieren).
what_happened: Pseudonymisieren uses a faint pink tint that reads as 'pending' rather than 'dangerous'.
what_you_expected: Variant=destructive with clear red border + white-on-red text. Confirm modal on click.
suggested_fix: Change to `variant='destructive'`. Wrap in a confirm modal; require typing the email a second time before commit.

title: /app/sheet-resync is internal tooling exposed in main nav 'Mehr' group
what_you_tried: Visited /app/sheet-resync.
what_happened: Legacy-Sheet Import page with CSV upload and idempotency-key input. The header banner reads 'Service-Account verfügbar. CSV-Upload trotzdem für manuelle Audits nutzbar.' — developer-speak.
what_you_expected: Either move into Einstellungen → 'Daten importieren' or gate behind a `?dev=1` flag.
suggested_fix: Move under Einstellungen as a sub-route. Drop the developer banner. Rename header to 'Daten aus dem alten Sheet importieren'.

title: Public form's 'Vollständige Datenschutzerklärung' link opens same tab; user loses form work
what_you_tried: Imagined an Externe filling out the form, clicking the legal link to read more.
what_happened: Same-tab navigation. While there's IndexedDB draft persistence (good), the back-button → potential loss for some flows.
what_you_expected: Open in a new tab.
suggested_fix: Add `target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'` on the datenschutz link in the Auslagen form.

title: IBAN field on extern Auslage lacks inline validation feedback (BIC / bank name)
what_you_tried: Typed an invalid IBAN ('DE00 1234 ABCD') under Externe Person.
what_happened: Inline error appears but no positive feedback for a valid IBAN.
what_you_expected: On valid IBAN: show 'Sparkasse München' + country flag inline; provides confidence the IBAN is right.
suggested_fix: Use an IBAN library (e.g. `iban-ts`) to validate + extract bank code. Reverse-lookup against a small JSON of German bank codes (Bundesbank publishes one) for the bank name.

title: Lists have no column-header sort
what_you_tried: Wanted to sort Transaktionen by Betrag desc.
what_happened: No clickable column headers.
what_you_expected: Click a column header to sort; second click reverses; third clears.
suggested_fix: Add `sortable` prop to column definitions. Store sort state in the URL (`?sort=betrag&dir=desc`) so it's bookmarkable. Server-side ORDER BY.

title: Disabled topbar elements (bell, mobile-search) should be removed, not styled-disabled
what_you_tried: Tapped the notification bell and the mobile search icon.
what_happened: Nothing happens; both elements are `disabled`. Visible-but-inert.
what_you_expected: Either functional or absent.
suggested_fix: Remove from JSX until shipped. Reduced chrome is calmer.

title: Mobile bottom FAB is permanently disabled — broken main action visual
what_you_tried: Tapped the center '+' FAB on mobile dashboard.
what_happened: Disabled, nothing happens.
what_you_expected: Either functional (open Manuell-hinzufügen sheet) or removed.
suggested_fix: Wire the FAB to navigate to `/app/inbox?manuell=1` (which auto-opens the sheet) OR drop the center FAB and the tab bar becomes 4 items (which is iOS HIG-friendly).

title: Dashboard WGB widget always visible regardless of utilization
what_you_tried: Looked at the WGB widget at 0% utilization.
what_happened: Big widget with progress bar at 0%, a long legal-citation paragraph, badge 'Im grünen Bereich'.
what_you_expected: Below 25% utilization: collapsed to a single-line summary 'WGB-Freigrenze: 1,7 % von 50.000 € ✓'. Expand on click.
suggested_fix: Add a `collapsed = $derived(einnahmenCents / freigrenzeCents < 0.25)` state. Show one-line when collapsed.

title: Dashboard 'Spenden YTD' sublabel mismatches (already in prior review MED-17)
what_you_tried: Re-examined the KPI strip.
what_happened: Sublabel '5 aktive Mitglieder' under 'Spenden YTD' — unrelated.
what_you_expected: Spenden-related sublabel: 'X Spenden in 2026' or 'letzte: 18.04.'
suggested_fix: Change sublabel to `${spendenCount} Spenden` and drop the activeMemberCount from this card's props.

title: No dedicated 'income + expense overview' page outside Jahresabschluss
what_you_tried: Tried to answer 'what did we spend this month' without opening Jahresabschluss.
what_happened: Transaktionen is a flat list with a 'Diesen Monat' chip but no per-month group sums or saldo trajectory.
what_you_expected: An overview view with month-grouped rows + per-month sum strip + cumulative saldo sparkline at top. See deepdive doc §2.3b.
suggested_fix: Group rows by `to_char(datum, 'YYYY-MM')` on the server. Render with sticky per-month headers showing the sum. Add a top-of-page sparkline.

title: Detail-page pattern (Member/Rechnung/Projekt) not validated — likely needs 2-column header summary
what_you_tried: Navigated to bogus member/rechnung/projekt UUIDs; got 404.
what_happened: Couldn't verify the layout with real data.
what_you_expected: All three detail pages share a pattern: top = identity left + money summary right + actions kebab, middle = timeline, bottom = related collections.
suggested_fix: Build a `DetailPageHeader` shared component that takes title, subtitle, status pill, summary tiles slot, actions slot. Use across Member/Rechnung/Projekt detail.

title: Toast layer not visible in AdminShell — feedback affordance missing
what_you_tried: Searched for a toast-host / sonner provider in AdminShell.
what_happened: None visible. Form actions return form data but there's no visual feedback layer.
what_you_expected: A toast portal mounted in AdminShell that auto-displays success/error from form actions.
suggested_fix: Add svelte-sonner or build a tiny toaster. Mount in AdminShell. Wire `enhance` callbacks to fire toasts.

title: Trip-distance: 'Was ist mein Saldo 2026?' costs 3 clicks
what_you_tried: Asked: where do I see the year-to-date Saldo?
what_happened: Heute → not there (KPIs are counts, not totals) → Jahresabschluss → 2026 → see Überschuss. 3 clicks.
what_you_expected: Visible from /app dashboard. 0 clicks.
suggested_fix: Add 'Saldo 2026' KPI card to dashboard (replaces 'Spenden YTD' which is too narrow). See deepdive §2.3a.

title: Trip-distance: 'wer hat noch nicht bezahlt' is 2 clicks and visual squinting
what_you_tried: Tried to find members in Beitragsrückstand.
what_happened: Heute → 'Beitrag fällig: 0' KPI (good for count) → click → Mitglieder → squint at year badges.
what_you_expected: Click 'Beitrag fällig' KPI → land on a filtered Mitglieder list ('Beiträge offen 2026'), not on the full list.
suggested_fix: Make the 'Beitrag fällig' KPI href `/app/mitglieder?beitrag=offen&jahr=2026` and ensure /app/mitglieder respects that filter.

title: Greeting 'Guten Tag' uses browser local time, not Europe/Berlin
what_you_tried: Reviewed greeting logic.
what_happened: Uses `new Date().getHours()`.
what_you_expected: Europe/Berlin (the Verein's locale).
suggested_fix: Use `new Date().toLocaleString('de-DE', { hour: 'numeric', timeZone: 'Europe/Berlin' })` and parse the leading number.
